name: io.github.jsgorana/ignition-mcp
description: MCP server for Inductive Automation Ignition: tags, alarms, history, and Perspective

environmentVariables.name: IGNITION_BRIDGE_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: HMAC secret shared with the mcp-bridge WebDev project; enables live tag/alarm/history/Perspective tools

environmentVariables.name: IGNITION_ALLOW_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable mutating tools (each call still requires confirm=true)
